title: thebasics-handbook-title-guide
text: The BASICs adds roleplay, identity, notes, teleport requests, player stats, and server tools. Most features are controlled by server config, so a command listed here may be hidden or permission-gated on a particular server. Start here - Use /thebasics help for the short command summary. - Use /thebasics guide or press H and choose the The BASICs tab for this guide. - Use Ctrl+Shift+B or /charsheet to open your character sheet when character sheets are enabled. - Use /chatprefs help if roleplay colors are hard to read. - Use /notes for private notes and /adminnotes <player> for staff notes when you have permission. Guide pages - Character Sheets: bios, /look, names, headshots, and character slots. - RP Chat: proximity chat, emotes, OOC, bubbles, and chatter. - Languages and Accessibility: language prefixes, language colors, and chat color presets. - Notes: private notes, staff notes, structured entries, and freeform ledgers. - TPA, Stats, and Utilities: teleport requests, player stats, repairs, and save notices. - Staff and Server Tools: admin commands and config panels.
